name: Arq's Ancients: Phoenix
author: Arquebus
description:
The phoenix is an act 3 ancient with a major focus on providing great power at great cost and a minor focus on regrowth.

Currently the mod is still in testing, with missing visual assets and final balancing.
It serves as an example of what can easily be done in STS2's current modding scene using only existing hooks, and no harmony patching.

Currently the mod is still in testing, with missing visual assets and final balancing.
